name: Kozue Orihara(Chaos;Head)
description:
Art from the Chaos;Head Noah visual novel.

I chose that picture, because big sword = funny. I know that it's technically spoilers, but, like, come on, we all know that she's a Gigalomaniac by now, right?

...Right? You did read the visual novel, didn't you? If you haven't, what are you doing here!!!? Get your butt on your PC, buy the game(when it goes on sale), and apply the Commitee of Zero patch!!! Hurry up!!!

So, yeah, you probably weren't expecting a SciADV bot again after the Key girl bot spam. I didn't either. I just thought it'd be funny to see what her funny little speech quirk would look like in LLM form. I also think she is best girl. What? Rimi is good and all, but Kozue is just as good, man! She's cute, has great chemistry with Sena(I swear these two have something going on, but I can't prove it...), and she has the best route in the game too! What can you NOT like about her?

Anyway, leave the usual comments/suggestions/compliments/insults/critiques whatever. I hope you enjoy or something.
creator: Notlol
